constraints.coverage_assumption: Treat the requested chain strictly as a citation/architecture-lineage trace through the five available papers; absence of a direct GPT-3→Transformer citation is itself a finding to state.
constraints.prohibition: no direct GPT-3 to Transformer edge

task.object: architecture lineage chain across two hops

entities: Hop 2 evidence (GPT-2 → Attention Is All You Need)
Explicit statement on absence of direct GPT-3 → Transformer citation
Technical artifact transmitted at each hop
normalized_question: Using only the 5-paper corpus, build a two-hop architecture chain GPT-3 → GPT-2 → "Attention Is All You Need". State what each hop establishes and explicitly do not invent a direct GPT-3 → Transformer citation.

obligations.description: Does GPT-3 (gpt3_2020) cite GPT-2 (gpt2_2019) as the prior architecture it extends, and what text in GPT-3 supports that?
Does GPT-2 (gpt2_2019) cite "Attention Is All You Need" (attention_is_all_you_need_2017) as the source of its Transformer architecture, and what text supports that?

raw_question: Using only the available papers, build the two-hop architecture chain from GPT-3 through GPT-2 to Attention Is All You Need. State what each hop establishes and do not invent a direct GPT-3-to-Transformer citation.
